title: Persona History Stable
description: A Persona has enough accepted history to support local stable pseudonymous continuity while staying bounded by the claim ladder.

inputs.protectedBaseline: The protected baseline uses long reflective return clauses and image-heavy pressure language that should not carry into the Persona history.
inputs.maskReference: Packet ready. Chain marked. Local review only. Keep the note short and consistent.
inputs.messageDraft: Please mark EXHIBIT-77 for local review and keep the custody note attached.
inputs.protectedOutput: EXHIBIT-77 ready. Custody note attached. Local review only. Chain marked.

history.text: Packet ready. Chain marked. Local review only.
Custody note attached. Review lane clean.
EXHIBIT-19 ready. Chain held. No extra language.
Receipt marked. Packet stays local. Review only.

calibrationNotes: Stable Persona continuity is local and history-bounded.
Level 7 can appear only as a local continuity candidate, never as identity proof.
